_fixture_notice: INTENTIONAL NEGATIVE FIXTURE (feature 056, NDEBT-023) -- a baseline that is SCHEMA-VALID on its own (all six reference categories present; every item carries both revision and timestamp) but VIOLATES the same-repository revision-consistency rule of ecosystem/02_evidence_baseline.md Sec 4: repository_references records TWO fully-anchored facts about the SAME repository (nizam-framework) at two DIFFERENT revisions. schema/ecosystem_baseline.schema.json cannot express this relational cross-item constraint, so it is caught by tools/validate.sh's C12 code-level same-repo revision-consistency check (mirrored in tools/ecosystem_preflight.py's find_repository_revision_inconsistencies), NOT by schema validation. This is the distinct sub-case ecosystem_baseline_neg_mixed_timestamps.json does NOT cover (that one is caught by the missing-timestamp schema rule).
